arts.ttl: Everton considering Goodison Park U-turn ahead of move to new stadium this summer
arts.sum: Everton are looking into the potential uses for Goodison Park when they move from their current home to their new state-of-the-art stadium at Bramley Moore Dock this summer

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool talent finds new club five months after Jose Mourinho tore up contract
arts.sum: Former Liverpool talent Ryan Kent has finally signed for a new club five months after leaving Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed title boost as Arsenal star limps off during Premier League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool are not back in action until Wednesday when they host Everton, but their closest Premier League title rivals Arsenal returned to face Fulham on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals double Liverpool injury boost ahead of Merseyside derby against Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot confirms a double injury boost ahead of Wednesday's Merseyside derby against Everton at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Everton.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Everton: Why Merseyside derby is key for Federico Chiesa as Arne Slot faces selection dilemma
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on Everton in the Merseyside derby on Wednesday in the Premier League, and the inclusion of Federico Chiesa could be important.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Everton - Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool's predicted lineup for Wednesday night's Merseyside Derby against Everton.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney backs Liverpool star to join Real Madrid
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and England star Wayne Rooney has thrown his backing behind Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold’s long-touted move to Real Madrid. The name of defender Alexander-Arnold has of course…

arts.ttl: Moyes delivers injury update on key Everton quartet ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: Everton boss David Moyes has issued an injury update on four of his key players ahead of facing Liverpool in the Premier League. The Toffees make the short journey to Anfield for the Merseyside Derby on Wednesday, with kickoff scheduled for 8pm UK time. arts.ttl: Mo Salah makes his preference clear with Liverpool and Saudi offers on the table
arts.sum: Liverpool are hanging on to hope that Mohamed Salah could agree a new contract with the club, despite the Egyptian heading for a free transfer as things stand, with the Saudi Pro League interested in signing the forward
